title: Architecture Review: notify-svc
summary: Notification service shows signs of vendor lock-in.
current_state_assessment: The service layer sends notifications through a gateway object, but SendGrid is used somewhere in the notification path.

findings.title: Tight coupling to SendGrid
findings.message: NotificationService's notification path ultimately calls SendGridAPIClient, breaking ADR-0003's requirement to abstract third-party notification providers. Swapping providers would require changes to NotificationService.
